case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. TERESA M CASTRO

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-01-2008 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST MICHAEL D. KAHN, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: OCT-01-2008, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-16-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR# 11332. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-01-2008 CONTINUED TO DEC-03-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE ADDRESS CHANGE, FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
